heading: Grants by Secretary of the Interior to assist Indian tribes with respect to agreements for return of Indian human remains and Indian funerary objects
label: 80q–12 Grants by Secretary of the Interior to assist Indian tribes with respect to agreements for return of Indian human remains and Indian funerary objects

children.text: the Board of Regents for the return of Indian human remains and Indian funerary objects under ; andsection 80q–9 of this title
other Federal and non-Federal entities for additional returns of Indian human remains and Indian funerary objects.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: b Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated $1,000,000 for fiscal year 1991 and such sums as may be necessary for succeeding fiscal years for grants under subsection (a).
